scenarios.title: Accidental liquid damage to the screen
scenarios.description: Within 20 months of purchase, the iPhone was accidentally submerged in water causing screen failure.

service_fee.notes: Service fee applies for ADH claims as specified in section 3.2

policy_references.snippet: Coverage includes accidental damage from handling resulting from unexpected external events such as liquid contact, with a $49 service fee per claim.
Coverage expires after two (2) Service Events; this claim counts toward that limit.

scenarios.reasoning: The claim is covered under section 3.2 since liquid contact caused an operational failure within the plan term. The $49 service fee applies. This claim counts toward the two-claim ADH limit stated in section 3.2.

scenarios.title: Camera malfunction due to manufacturing defect
scenarios.description: Within the 24-month plan term, the rear camera of the iPhone 13 Mini fails to focus and capture images properly without any accidental damage event.

service_fee.notes: No service fee applies for hardware defects as per policy

policy_references.snippet: If during the Plan Term, you submit a valid claim by notifying Apple that a defect in materials and workmanship has arisen in the Covered iPhone, Apple will repair or exchange the device at no charge.

scenarios.reasoning: The camera malfunction is caused by a manufacturing defect within the plan term, therefore covered under section 3.1 Hardware Service. No accidental damage is reported, so no service fee or ADH service event limit applies.
